candidates.why: Represents core operating revenue and matches exactly the total revenue figures shown; appropriate as primary revenue line.
Explicit total revenue line equal to Operating revenue; suitable as alternate label in case of label changes over time.
This is a tax item on revenue, not revenue itself; should not be used for top-line sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue; inappropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Both 'Total Revenue' and 'Operating revenue' contain identical top-line figures; use them as alternate revenue labels with priority to 'Total Revenue' as the explicit total.

candidates.why: Classic COGS / cost of sales line; matches definition of direct production costs.
Personnel/overhead costs typical of SG&A; not labeled as COGS and not a total/subtotal.
Bucket of operating overhead expenses; suitable SG&A component; not a total/subtotal.
Share-based compensation reserve, which is part of SG&A-type overhead costs.

variables.notes: All three selected rows are SG&A-type overhead components and are not totals, depreciation, or interest.

candidates.why: This is a tax credit related to R&D, not the R&D expense itself; generally treated as contra-tax, not the R&D cost line.
Explicit R&D expense line; best semantic match for XRD even if preview values are empty.

variables.notes: Use the explicit R&D expense line; the R&D tax credit is not selected as the expense itself.

candidates.why: EBIT is pre-interest operating profit, not interest expense; should not be used as XINT.
Interest income (net), not expense; only used for XINT if no expense lines existed, which is not the case here.
Aggregated net interest expense; best single line for XINT per guidance to prefer interest expense lines.
Specific component of interest expense; useful as alternate if net interest expenses unavailable for some years.
Another specific interest expense component; valid fallback for XINT.
Interest on payables; a smaller but valid component of interest expense.
Interest portion of lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Represents allocation of profit to minority shareholders, not an interest expense on debt.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity attribution, not debt interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; valid additional source for interest expense data.
Same as income statement EBIT; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Change in interest-bearing debt (short and long)
candidates.why: Represents financing flows, not interest cost; should not be used for XINT.
Direct cash measure of interest paid; good fallback if income-statement interest expense is missing in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority is the net interest expense line, followed by its specific components and then cash interest paid; EBIT, minority interests, and change in interest-bearing debt are excluded as they are not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Change in Tax Rate on Equity Posted PPA in Prior Years
candidates.why: This is an equity-related tax adjustment item in OCI, not total book equity; cannot be used as BE.

variables.notes: No proper total equity / shareholders’ equity line is available in the provided candidate list (likely present on the balance sheet, which is not included here). Manual review needed to map BE from the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Represents profit attributable to non-controlling (minority) shareholders; appropriate for MIB.
Alternative label for the same concept; values match Non-controlling interests, useful as an alternate over time.

variables.notes: Both labels refer to the same minority interest concept; included as alternates in case of label changes over time.
